items.claim: John Paul Labosiani struggles with distance and reach against taller opponents.
items.quote: I expected John Paul Labosiani to kind of struggle with the distance and the reach

items.claim: John Paul Labosiani relies heavily on head kicks in his striking game.
items.quote: a lot of his striking is really headkick dependent.

items.claim: John Paul Labosiani is effective at threatening submissions and returning to his feet when taken down.
items.quote: JPL is going to make him work. He's going to threaten submissions. He's probably going to get back up to his feet.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is coming off a long layoff following a suspension for steroid use.
items.quote: Then you see him pop for steroids. Now we know how tough why he's so damn tough. But you get caught for the steroids, you get the suspension, you get the layoff.

items.claim: Alvin Hines showed poor defensive skills in his previous fight.
items.quote: last time out, he didn't look defensively all that sound.

items.claim: Levy Rodriguez Jr. is coming off a suspension for testosterone-related steroid use.
items.quote: coming off of a suspension for steroids... got caught for I think it was like testosterone related stuff

items.claim: Felipe Franco demonstrated high durability and the ability to handle power in his debut against Mario Pinto.
items.quote: dealing with a guy who deals with power really well. We saw that last time out.

items.claim: Felipe Franco fights with a level of patience and maturity beyond his 25 years.
items.quote: at 25 years old, he doesn't fight like somebody who's 25 years old. Like, he fights like somebody who's been doing it for a while. He's patient.
